items.name: NYC Women in Tech: Founders & Professionals Networking Night
items.why: Features 1-minute founder pitches across wellness, beauty, health and fitness startups, a core audience for the lounge

items.name: NYC Startups, Investors and Professionals Pitch and Networking Event
items.why: Founder and investor mixer with elevator pitches, good for meeting consumer startup builders the day before the lounge

items.name: NY's Biggest Business, Tech & Entrepreneur Networking Affair
items.why: Large Midtown entrepreneur and founder mixer two days before the lounge, useful for last-minute outreach

items.name: Body Wellness: Safe-Space Coaching Class (Manhattan)
items.why: Small-group wellness coaching class in Manhattan, an on-theme wellness audience to tap post-event
